markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO performance and address urgent technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Urgent Technical Fixes:** Critical issues are blocking growth. The `robots.txt` file is missing (an `LLM.txt` is being used instead), causing crawlers to block essential site resources like JavaScript and images.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [**Content Stagnation:** Publishing paused in December, causing a growth slowdown. 11 ready-to-publish articles are awaiting review to restore momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - **Keyword Progress:** Branded keywords are strong (`AI recruiter`, `Alex AI interviewer` rank \#1), which is a key step toward ranking for high-volume, non-branded terms.
  - [**New Reporting Tool:** Next week, Carly will demo "Check That," a new tool for more granular LLM citation tracking, replacing the current "Scrunch" reports.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Content Stagnation

  - [**Growth Slowdown:** Publishing paused in December, causing a growth slowdown and slight drop in non-branded keyword visibility (from 15% to 13.9%).](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Branded Keyword Success:**](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - `AI recruiter` → Ranks \#1
      - `Alex AI interviewer` → Ranks \#1 (improved from \~50th)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 11 articles are ready for review. Publishing them will restore growth momentum and build internal link authority for keywords like `AI recruiter` and `AI interview`.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Urgent Technical SEO Audit (Screaming Frog)

  - [**Problem:** The site is using an `LLM.txt` file instead of a standard `robots.txt`.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Impact:** Crawlers are blocking essential resources (JS, images), which prevents proper page rendering and indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a standard `robots.txt` and separate the `LLM.txt` file.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### Other Technical Issues

  - [**Schema Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [`Organization` schema is incorrectly applied to all pages; it must be homepage-only.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
      - [`Product` schema must be specific to product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**404 Errors:** Numerous 404 pages are wasting crawl budget and must be redirected (301) to the main blog page.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Sitemap Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [The auto-generated Webflow sitemap includes non-indexable URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [Carly will investigate how to remove them.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Non-Indexable Pages:** Staging, demo, and old homepage URLs are indexable and must be set to `noindex`.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [**Missing Elements:** Several pages are missing H1 tags and image alt text.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
      - [Send Donald a summary of the top 5 technical issues from the Screaming Frog audit.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
      - [Investigate how to remove non-indexable URLs from the auto-generated Webflow sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [Demo the "Check That" reporting tool in next week's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Separate the `LLM.txt` file from the `robots.txt` file.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Correct the schema implementation: `Organization` (homepage only), `Product` (product pages only).](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [Implement 301 redirects for all 404 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [Set `noindex` for all staging, demo, and old homepage URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
      - [Review the 11 ready-to-publish articles to restore content momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/ddKFzbiLUGoPaaP4Vm4zyhwUWaMeKAyR?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
